text.title: Model Context Protocol — Architecture and Core Primitives — Decision Tree

decision-tree.root-question: Where will the MCP server run?

branch.conclusion: Use stdio transport. Single-process, no auth needed.
Use Resources. HTTP+SSE or Streamable HTTP transport + OAuth 2.1.
Use Tools. HTTP+SSE + OAuth 2.1 + capability attestation.
Use Prompts. Same transport. Mark descriptions as untrusted.

example.p: Filesystem MCP server for Claude Desktop → local_desktop_host → stdio → tools=[read_file,write_file], resources=[file://].
